A.code:
import sys
import re
from collections import defaultdict

log = sys.argv[1]
counts = defaultdict(int)
for line in log.splitlines():
    m = re.match(r'(\S+) \S+ \S+ \[.*?\] ".*?" (\d{3})', line)
    if m:
        ip, status = m.group(1), int(m.group(2))
        if 400 <= status < 500:
            counts[ip] += 1
top_ip = max(counts, key=lambda k: counts[k])
sys.stdout.write(f"{top_ip}\t{counts[top_ip]}\n")

B.code:
(set logs (argv))
(set counts {})
(for-each log logs
  (set parts (split log " "))
  (if (and (gt (len parts) 8)
           (ge (parse_int (last parts)) 400)))
    (map_set counts [first parts] (add (get_or counts [first parts] 0) 1))))
(set top_ip "")
(set top_count 0)
(for-each k (keys counts)
  (if (gt (get_or counts [k] 0) top_count))
    (set top_ip k)
    (set top_count (get_or counts [k] 0))))
(println (fmt "{}\t{}\n" top_ip top_count))

A.code:
import sys
import csv
from collections import defaultdict
from io import StringIO

data = sys.argv[1]
totals = defaultdict(float)
reader = csv.DictReader(StringIO(data))
for row in reader:
    totals[row['category']] += float(row['amount'])
top3 = sorted(totals.items(), key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)[:3]
for cat, amt in top3:
    sys.stdout.write(f"{cat}: ${amt:.2f}\n")

B.code:
(set rows (split $0 "\n"))
(set data (map_arr (slice rows 1 (len rows)) (\r (split r ","))))
(set agg {})
(for-each row data
  (set amt (float (last row)))
  (set cat (first row))
  (if (has agg cat)
    (set agg (json_set agg [cat] (add (json_get agg [cat]) amt)))
    (else (set agg (json_merge agg {cat amt}))))
)
(set sorted (sort_by (entries agg) (\(k v) (- v))))
(for-each e (slice sorted 0 3)
  (println (fmt "{}: ${:.2f}" (first e) (last e))))

import sys
import re

source = sys.argv[1]
for line in source.split('\n'):
    m = re.match(r'^def ([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)\(', line)
    if m:
        sys.stdout.write(m.group(1) + '\n')

A.code:
import sys

def tsv_to_md(data):
    lines = data.strip().split('\n')
    rows = [line.split('\t') for line in lines]
    result = ''
    result += '| ' + ' | '.join(rows[0]) + ' |\n'
    result += '| ' + ' | '.join(['---'] * len(rows[0])) + ' |\n'
    for row in rows[1:]:
        result += '| ' + ' | '.join(row) + ' |\n'
    return result

sys.stdout.write(tsv_to_md(sys.argv[1]))

| bob | 25 | nyc

A.code:
import sys
from collections import defaultdict

data = sys.argv[1]
counts = defaultdict(int)
for line in data.splitlines():
    parts = line.split(' ', 2)
    if len(parts) >= 2 and parts[1] == 'ERROR':
        hour = parts[0].split('T')[1][:2]
        counts[hour] += 1
best = max(counts, key=lambda h: counts[h])
sys.stdout.write(best + '\n')

B.code:
(set logs (argv))
(set counts {})
(for-each log logs
  (set parts (split log " "))
  (if (eq (first parts) "ERROR")
    (set hour (slice (second parts) 11 13))
    (map_arr (chars hour)
      (\c (char_from_code (add (string_get c 0) 48)))
      (\d (str d))
      (\s (join (sort (chars s)) ""))
      (\h (first (split s "")))
      (set counts (json_set counts [h] (add (get_or (json_get counts [h]) 0) 1)))))
(println (last (sort_by (map_pairs counts (\k v (array k v))) (\p (neg (last p)))))))

A.code:
import sys
import re

text = sys.argv[1]
matches = re.findall(r'\b(?:\d{1,3}\.){3}\d{1,3}\b', text)
sys.stdout.write('\n'.join(matches) + '\n')

import sys
lines = sys.argv[1].strip().split('\n')
out = ''
for line in lines:
    parts = line.split()
    out += parts[1] + ' ' + parts[2] + '\n'
sys.stdout.write(out)
